Gemini CLI Update: Build Apps Automatically in Your Terminal!

Google just released a massive update to Gemini CLI that transforms the tool into a fully autonomous AI agent. Learn how to use the new features like Plan Mode and MCP servers to automate complex coding tasks and business workflows in seconds.

00:00 - Intro: The New Gemini CLI
01:20 - What is Gemini CLI?
02:23 - Feature 1: Tab Autocomplete
02:50 - Feature 2: Desktop Notifications
03:16 - Feature 3: Enhanced Plan Mode
03:56 - Feature 4: MCP Progress Bars
04:20 - Feature 5: Smarter Agent Planning
05:20 - Why AI Agents Change Everything
